filesCreated.purpose: Block metadata and attributes
Block registration with 5 variations (post, team_member, resource, testimonial, policy)
Editor component with FilteredServerSideRender, ThemeHeading, sidebar controls
Frontend template with WP_Query, taxonomy filtering, pagination, per-page, cards
AJAX filtering, URL state management, load more, filter pills, per-page selector
Filter remove button X icon, clip-path for blog cards, hover transitions
Main block icon (24x24 grid)
Blog archive variation icon
Team member archive variation icon
Resource archive variation icon
Testimonial archive variation icon
Policy archive variation icon
Search icon for keyword filter input
Animated loading spinner for AJAX requests
Blog post card with alternating layout, accent color from category, clip-path image
Team member card with accent bg, photo meta, department tag, name from meta
Resource card with dark bg, hover to accent-lighter, taxonomy tags
Policy card with dark bg, hover to accent fill, topic tags
Testimonial card with blockquote, no link (private CPT)
Register custom query vars for archive filter parameters

warnings: Asset size limit warnings (entrypoint sizes) - not related to this block

syncStatus.notes: TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender for archive preview, so only ThemeHeading and section wrapper need sync. Both use same classes and structure.

output.taxonomiesNote: All required taxonomies already exist in separate files: inc/taxonomies/department.php (team_member), inc/taxonomies/audience.php (resource), inc/taxonomies/resource_type.php (resource), inc/taxonomies/policy_topic.php (policy). No modifications to post type files were needed.
